title: callitriche brutia subsp. naftolskyi
intro: Callitriche brutia subsp. naftolskyi is a subspecies of the Callitriche brutia plant, a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Callitriche brutia subsp. naftolskyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic, making it a useful remedy for urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Callitriche brutia subsp. naftolskyi can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
